headline: General Mills (GIS) Valuation Check After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: General Mills (GIS) shares have been under pressure recently, with the stock down over the past month and past 3 months. This has prompted some investors to revisit the packaged food company’s fundamentals and current valuation. See our latest analysis for General Mills. Beyond the recent pullback, General Mills’ recent 90 day share price return is down 31.46%, and its 1 year total shareholder return is down 35.64%. This suggests momentum has been fading as investors reassess growth prospects...
